svg.text: Apache Flink API stack (top = highest abstraction)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What connectors and formats does Apache Flink support?')
g.text: Kafka · Kinesis · JDBC · S3 · Iceberg · Pulsar · Filesystem
Avro · Protobuf · JSON · Parquet · ORC · CSV

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Flink Table API and SQL')
g.text: SELECT · JOIN · window TVFs · MATCH_RECOGNIZE · ML_PREDICT

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Flink DataStream API core operators')
sendPrompt('Tell me about Flink CEP and how it is built on DataStream API')
sendPrompt('What are Apache Flink Agents and how do they relate to DataStream?')
sendPrompt('Explain Flink Process Functions and Process Table Functions PTFs with driving modes and @StateHint')
g.text: Timers · side outputs · raw state · @StateHint · driving modes
Task scheduling · checkpointing · state backends · fault tolerance
